reason: The image contains a mix of elements that could be from the late 90s and early 2000s, along with more modern elements. The television sets and landline phone seem appropriate. However, the tablet device with its clean design and the style of the electrical box connected to the mask look too modern. The general style of the image also has a more modern aesthetic than 1999 would typically produce. While the Rejuvenique Beauty Mask was a real product from that time, the depiction here has anachronisms.
